agribalyse.name_fr: Mousse au chocolat traditionnelle, rayon frais
Mousse au chocolat traditionnelle, rayon frais

ingredients_text: Chocolate mousse 96% (water, glucose syrup, skim milk powder, sugar, whipping cream, coconut oil, cocoa powder, dark chocolate 1.9% (cocoa paste, sugar, fat reduced cocoa, cocoa powder, vanilla pods), alcohol, gelatine, fat reduced cocoa powder, stabiliser (420), emulsifiers (472b, 471), thickeners (415, 412), salt), chocolate decoration 4% (coconut fat, dark chocolate 1.7% (cocoa mass, sugar).)
